parts.text: I’m calling to complete a transfer of responsibility.
How do I transfer my wireless service to a new owner?
I want to change the account holder for my business services.
Can you help me move responsibility for this line to another person/company?
I need to transfer ownership of my business account.
I want to get new service.
Can you give me the interaction id so I can transfer the ownershipt of my phone.
I was told that I can keep my phone but I will responsible paying for it.
I'm moving my corporate phone to my personal account.
I left my work but I'm keeping my phone number.
I'm doing a transfer of responsibility
I am taking over the responsibility of paying the phone I'm using
I'm transferring my phone number to a personal account.
I'm leaving the company and I'm keeping my phone number.
I need an interaction id so I can transfer my phone number to a personal account.
